div.style: font-family: Cambria, serif; font-size: 11pt; color: #000; width: 100%; padding-top: 0px;

td.style: width: 20%; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; border: 0 !important; padding: 0;
width: 50%; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom; color: #003399; border: 0 !important; padding: 0 0 5px 0;

div.style: border-bottom: 12px solid #e0e0e0; width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding-bottom: 2px;

td.style: width: 30%; border: 0 !important; padding: 0; vertical-align: middle; text-align: right;

table.style: width: 85%; margin-left: auto; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid black; font-size: 8pt; line-height: 1.1;

td.style: padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: right;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: right;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: right;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: right;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;
padding: 1px 3px; border-bottom: 1px solid black; border-right: none; border-left: none; text-align: right;
padding: 1px 3px; border: none; text-align: left; font-weight: bold;

div.style: font-family: Cambria, serif; font-size: 11pt; color: #000; width: 100%; position: relative; background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,'); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: bottom right; background-size: 480px 480px;

table.style: width: 100%; border: 0px none transparent !important; font-size: 11pt; margin-bottom: 20px; line-height: 1.5;

div.style: display: inline-block; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14pt; vertical-align: bottom; border: 0 !important; white-space: nowrap;

display: inline-block; width: 68%; border-bottom: 1.5px solid black !important; text-align: left; vertical-align: bottom; padding-bottom: 2px; border-left: 0 !important; border-top: 0 !important; border-right: 0 !important;

table.style: width: 100%; text-align: center; border: 0 !important; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0;

div.style: border-top: 1px solid black; padding-top: 5px; width: 90%; margin: 0 auto; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10pt;

td.div:
Analista de Control de Calidad
ANALIZÓ

div.style: border-top: 1px solid black; padding-top: 5px; width: 90%; margin: 0 auto; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10pt;

td.div:
Supervisor de Control de Calidad
REVISÓ

div.style: border-top: 1px solid black; padding-top: 5px; width: 90%; margin: 0 auto; font-weight: bold; font-size: 10pt;
